changelog:
Provider tab usability: self-contained custom providers, editable accounts, provider models in pickers, realtime + dark-mode fixes.

=== Self-contained custom providers (config/config.go, proxy/provider_*.go) ===

- Adding a custom (bring-your-own URL+key) provider no longer registers a reusable Config.Providers[] entry. Dialect, base URL, and pinned models are stored INLINE on the account (new Account.CustomDialect / Account.CustomModels; base URL reuses BaseURLOverride). The account's Backend id is its own routing prefix, so a custom endpoint no longer pollutes the Add-provider picker.
- New config.GetCustomAccountByBackend resolves these inline accounts. Routing resolvers updated to recognise them: ProviderForBackend, resolveProviderPrefix, dialectFor, resolveProviderSettings.
- ensureUniqueBackendID guarantees a unique routing id (loops on collision; reserves kiro/codex/qoder and built-ins).

=== Editable provider accounts (proxy/handler.go, web/index.html) ===

- apiUpdateAccount accepts apiKey (rotate; blank keeps current), baseURL (https-only; cannot be cleared on a custom account), and models (array or CSV) for NON-Kiro accounts only (guarded by isKiro). Model edits push to the pool routing filter immediately.
- accounts API exposes baseURLOverride/customDialect/customModels/modelList (not credentials; admin-gated) so the new Edit modal prefills. Added an Edit button + modal on each provider account row.

=== Provider models in pickers (proxy/handler.go, proxy/apikeys_handler.go) ===

- /v1/models now lists NON-Kiro provider models WITH their routing prefix (e.g. groq/llama-3.3-70b, cb/gpt-4o) via providerPrefixedModelEntries, so they are discoverable and route correctly. Bare ids still stay private to per-account routing (no mis-route to Kiro).
- The API-key editor's model checklist (GET /admin/api/models/available) now includes the same prefixed provider models, so a key can be allowlisted to a provider model. The runtime gate matches the full prefixed id end-to-end.

=== UI fixes (web/index.html) ===

- Providers tab joins the 5s realtime poll loop.
- Refresh-models button re-pulls accounts and re-renders the tab (was alert-only).
- Test dialog + Test button use theme variables (were hardcoded light colors, unreadable in dark mode).
- Empty model list shows 'any model' (routes anything) rather than a scary 'no models'.

=== Tests ===

- provider_selfcontained_test.go (inline custom resolution, ensureUniqueBackendID reserved-name guard), provider_models_list_test.go (prefixed entries in /v1/models and the API-key editor, routingPrefixForBackend). Reviewer-flagged fixes applied: collision loop, reserved bespoke backends, custom baseURL clear rejection.
